flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Louisiana State University-Alexandria are 10% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($42.2k vs $47.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Louisiana State University-Alexandria fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Louisiana State University-Alexandria rose 77% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2k → 5.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Louisiana State University-Alexandria rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 (26.5% → 34.2%).
